title: Under the Bridge
meaning_summary: Its emotional directness and broad alternative-rock familiarity keep it commercially durable long after release.
revenue_drivers: Alternative-rock playlists support steady catalog streaming.
Strong cultural memory keeps the song active in rediscovery loops.
Sync and catalog reuse can lift revenue above the baseline.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps the headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross track, label, publishing, and songwriter lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely controlled through the recording label or distributor unless a specific rights sale is known
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits affect the publishing share shown here
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No specific catalog sale adjustment is modeled for this track
ownership.notes: Under the Bridge is modeled from public-facing catalog behavior and conservative rights-split assumptions, not from audited royalty statements.
